items.text:
We grade every contractor around Lake Livingston. Then we work for the ones who want to be #1. Top of Class Marketing grades all 1,900 service businesses across Polk,
Walker, San Jacinto and Trinity counties every week — reviews, rankings,
websites, claimed listings — and publishes it free. Then we do the
marketing for the HVAC and plumbing shops that want the top spot. https://aaron.chat/
Every contractor around Lake Livingston is already graded — look yourself up free, no signup. https://aaron.chat/report-card/
Website + rankings + weekly review-velocity tracking for shops gunning for the local top 3. https://aaron.chat/pricing/
All 48 Lake Livingston-area HVAC shops graded weekly — see what it takes to catch #1. https://aaron.chat/hvac-marketing/
All 66 local plumbing shops graded weekly — 44% have no website. The rankings are up for grabs. https://aaron.chat/plumber-marketing/

Q: What is the Lake Livingston Service Pro Report?

A: A free public site that grades every service business in Polk, Walker, San Jacinto and Trinity counties weekly on reviews, rankings, websites and claimed listings — the exact signals homeowners use to pick who gets the call. https://stats.lakelivingston.aaron.chat/

Q: Is the report card really free?

A: Yes. Search your business name and your card is right there — grade, class rank, and your three biggest fixes. No signup, nobody calls you. https://aaron.chat/report-card/

Q: Do clients get graded differently?

A: No — same public formula for everyone, including businesses we work for. If our clients' grades don't climb, everyone can see it. That's the accountability model. https://aaron.chat/about/

Q: Do you require long contracts?

A: No. Month to month on every plan. The public scoreboard is the retention strategy — if the grade stops climbing, you should leave. https://aaron.chat/pricing/
Also find Top of Class Marketing on The Lake Livingston Service Pro Report: https://stats.lakelivingston.aaron.chat/
Also find Top of Class Marketing on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/heyaaronmarketing
Also find Top of Class Marketing on X: https://x.com/heyaaaron
Also find Top of Class Marketing on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/aaronphillips/
Also find Top of Class Marketing on Instagram: https://instagram.com/heyaaaron
Also find Top of Class Marketing on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@heyaaaron
Also find Top of Class Marketing on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@heyaaronmarketing
Also find Top of Class Marketing on Mastodon: https://mastodon.social/@heyaaron
Also find Top of Class Marketing on Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/heyaaron.bsky.social
